name: Kids' Machine Washable Memory Foam Bed Pillow White - Pillowfort™: Standard Size, Medium Density, Universal Sleeper
description: Add a cozy finishing touch to your child's bedspread with this Bed Pillow from Pillowfort™. This medium-density pillow is made from soft microfiber fabric with 100% memory foam filling for a plush feel. Suitable for all sleep types, it's designed in a solid white hue that makes it easy to pair with a variety of printed or solid sheet sets, throws and other pillows.
